title: taraxacum caudiferum
intro: Taraxacum caudiferum, also known as the feathered dandelion or woolly dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) characterized by its distinctive feather-like leaves and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Taraxacum caudiferum include its potential to support liver health, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum caudiferum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
